subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested the Manifestation of His Cause as He pleaseth, and hath caused Him to speak forth verses whereby the atoms are drawn in rapture, that they may attain unto certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر مظهر امره کیف شاء انطقه بایات التی انجذبت منها الذرات لیوقنن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
